[2020-05-03 20:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): i famously beat apooche when he did that with a turn 1 animus

[2020-05-03 20:22] p0lari (Polari): there are some corner cases with thorium like p2 going 12 2 into zemora but yeah it's rare
[2020-05-03 20:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): beware perferators, immolites, electrovores, the like
[2020-05-03 20:23] p0lari (Polari): trinity is the unit that made me give up on my stance of embargoing nothing
[2020-05-03 20:23] masn6811 (Masne98888): i mean trinity isn't a broken unit, its far lower power level than thorium or just about any alt drone
[2020-05-03 20:23] masn6811 (Masne98888): it just happens to have the weird property that it helps p2 but not p1
[2020-05-03 20:24] p0lari (Polari): yeah I like trinity when playing with it but seeing it in set as p1 is miserable
[2020-05-03 20:24] masn6811 (Masne98888): well the thing is p1 is inherently weaker because of the quantative disadvantage
[2020-05-03 20:24] masn6811 (Masne98888): its just that its balanced out by the fact that p2 has worse openers
[2020-05-03 20:25] masn6811 (Masne98888): if you add enough alt drones to a set, trinity or not, p2 comes out ahead
[2020-05-03 20:25] masn6811 (Masne98888): so in a way you could argue that trinity doesn't so much advantage p2 than expose the advantage p2 has
[2020-05-03 20:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): i mean trinity is kinda a meh unit, it's okay if it were removed from the game ig
[2020-05-03 20:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): thorium didnt exist when it first existed, so it kinda needed to exist then for bp to actually be a thing
[2020-05-03 20:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): but i still think thorium's current power level is unacceptable
[2020-05-03 20:28] flakmaniak: Does Thorium advantage P1 or P2 particularly?
[2020-05-03 20:28] flakmaniak: I consistently have fun in Thorium sets.
[2020-05-03 20:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): I consistently buy Thorium in Thorium sets
[2020-05-03 20:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): the thorium + chrono filter + antima jebaited is hilarious tho
[2020-05-03 20:30] flakmaniak: Wait, what about those three units?
[2020-05-03 20:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): ```
DD .. DD
D1 .. 11
DD .. (oh shit i can't buy chrono filter) D i guess
buys chrono filter .. fucking dies```
[2020-05-03 20:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): so the way p2 has to avoid just dying like that is to buy natural conduit
[2020-05-03 20:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): so p1 has bought thorium and p2 has not, and thorium is a good unit
[2020-05-03 20:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): so p1 is in general heavily favored when all three are in a set
[2020-05-03 20:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): so yeah that's why thorium's power level is unacceptable, it's "buy it or probably lose" territory
[2020-05-03 20:35] masn6811 (Masne98888): and thats not even counting it's tech-fixing ability or how it supports BP
[2020-05-03 20:35] flakmaniak: So wait, why does P2 hard lose to that Antima?
[2020-05-03 20:35] flakmaniak: Can't P2 make all their Drones into Thoriums and take it on the chin?
[2020-05-03 20:36] p0lari (Polari): is DD DDC DD2 better than DD D1 D2?
[2020-05-03 20:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): it technically transposes
[2020-05-03 20:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): you have 5 drones and a conduit instead of a thorium
[2020-05-03 20:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): but you'd rather have 5 drones and a conduit
[2020-05-03 20:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): so you can buy a thorium later
[2020-05-03 20:37] masn6811 (Masne98888): so yes p2 can technically buy a thorium, but the line where he does is so bad that it's worse than not buying thorium

--- Thread (39 messages, 2020-05-03) ---
[2020-05-03 20:37] masn6811 (Masne98888): and not buying thorium is bad
[2020-05-03 20:38] p0lari (Polari): yeah I'm not doubting you, just figured you'd probably know and I could ask instead of thinking it through
[2020-05-03 20:39] p0lari (Polari): on the surface they look pretty close, which I guess they are if they sorta-transpose
[2020-05-03 20:39] masn6811 (Masne98888): actually, i think the thorium line gives you 1 more gold and 1 less green
[2020-05-03 20:39] masn6811 (Masne98888): but thats pretty much the same thing /s
[2020-05-03 20:40] p0lari (Polari): yeah I was wondering about floating green before the antima
[2020-05-03 20:40] masn6811 (Masne98888): one way to think of thorium is that you're paying 5E to buy 2 drones this turn and promising to pay 5 for a conduit next turn
[2020-05-03 20:40] masn6811 (Masne98888): (on top of its BP and flexibility advantages)
[2020-05-03 20:40] masn6811 (Masne98888): so this is obviously very good
[2020-05-03 20:40] masn6811 (Masne98888): because you get 1 gold one turn earlier
[2020-05-03 20:40] masn6811 (Masne98888): basically floating -1 gold
[2020-05-03 20:40] masn6811 (Masne98888): and you also get an energy out of thin air
[2020-05-03 20:43] p0lari (Polari): right the free energy is pretty big, I've never thoroughly compared different lines but occasionally I've thought about what triple engi lines would look like in thorium sets if you thought it was really high econ and I tend to come back to why not just utilise the free energy from thorium purchases and by the time you're at four and no longer easily using your gold you're above 20 income already
[2020-05-03 20:43] p0lari (Polari): you can also buy some conduits to effectively spend gold as energy
[2020-05-03 20:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): ive thought about it a few times
[2020-05-03 20:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): DD/DDE/DDD/D11 for p1 example
[2020-05-03 20:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): two conclusions though:

DD   DD

1DDD 1DDD```

[2020-05-03 20:59] p0lari (Polari): mostly it just doesn't matter
